common.noFactory: No factory selected. Pick the current factory in the top bar.

page.categoriesSub: Multi-level category tree · names in 9 languages
page.seriesSub: Series name / intro in 9 languages · cover image
page.rulesSub: Cross-category compatibility engine · auto suggest / link accessories
page.importSub: Import products, specs, images and accessory links from a multi-sheet workbook — preview before committing
page.factoryCount: {n} factories — edit brand, contacts and theme color
page.attributesSub: Unified attribute keys and 9-language names, shared by accessory matching, spec tables, AI intake and bulk import

dashboard.noScans: No scans in the last 30 days

category.empty: No categories yet. Click “+ Top category”, then use 📁 on a row to add subcategories.
category.selectHint: Select a category on the left to edit it here
category.selectSub: Category names support 9 languages + AI translation; set image and parent
category.draftOk: Created — fill in the name on the right and save
category.needNameFirst: Fill in the source-language name before translating

series.empty: No series yet. Click “+ New series” to create one.
series.selectHint: Select a series on the left to edit it here
series.selectSub: Series name / intro support 9 languages + AI translation; set cover and category
series.draftOk: Created — fill in the name on the right and save
series.introPh: Series intro, shown atop the public “Discover the … series” page…
series.deleteConfirm: Delete series “{name}”? Its products will become unassigned.
series.needNameFirst: Fill in the source-language content before translating

rule.count: {n} rules. Rules define which product type fits which, auto-suggesting accessories across categories.
rule.empty: No rules yet. Click “New rule”, e.g. main “Strip” → accessory “Channel”, condition pcbWidth equal.
rule.name: Rule name
rule.conditions: Match conditions (all must pass · empty = same category fits)
rule.noCond: No conditions: products in the main category will suggest all products in the accessory category.
rule.bidir: Bidirectional (also suggest the main on the accessory page)
rule.autoLinkOpt: Auto-link (otherwise only suggest on the product page)
rule.needTwoCats: Rules need at least two categories (main + accessory). Create your category tree first.

attr.keyHint: Starts with a letter; letters/digits/underscore only. Cannot be changed later
attr.nameHint: Write the source name in Spanish (same as product source content)
attr.deleteConfirm: Delete attribute “{name}”? Data already saved on products is not affected; only future suggestions and translated names are.
attr.empty: No attributes yet — preset common LED attributes or create one

prod.name: Product name
prod.galleryEmpty: No gallery images yet. Upload 3–6: main shot, close-ups, install, scene.
prod.certPh: Type and press Enter, e.g. CE / RoHS / IP65
prod.deleteSub: Also removes this product's images / documents / videos / links / stats. Irreversible.
prod.variantSub: Same model, different specs · powers the public spec selector & compare
prod.variantEmpty: No variants yet. LED products usually come in wattage / CCT / length options — add the other specs of this model to form a group.
prod.variantLabelHint: Labels show on the public spec-selector pills; empty falls back to the model number
prod.certsHint: Only list certifications that actually appear on the packaging or certificates. The public page explains known marks.
prod.dictHint: When linked to a dictionary attribute, the parameter name uses the dictionary translation for each language

show.sub: Selling points · highlights · applications · long detail · FAQ
show.auditNote: Reviewing a translation — spec translations are AI-maintained here; variant label / luminaire type / dimension values are source-only, edited under “source”.
show.aiGenHint: From luminaire type + specs, generate selling points / highlights / scenes / FAQ / box contents / install / long detail. Draft only, review before saving.
show.aiTransTitle: Multilingual: fill one, AI completes the other 8
show.aiTransHint: Pick the source language below, save first, then translate. Saved directly, re-runnable.
show.staleWarn: ⚠ Source content changed — translations may be stale. Re-run AI translate.
show.switchConfirm: Switching language discards unsaved changes. Switch anyway?
show.genConfirm: The AI draft will overwrite the current showcase content (not stored until you click Save). Continue?
show.transConfirm: This translates the SAVED source-language content into the other 8 languages and stores it. Save your current edits first. Continue?
show.transNameHint: Leave empty to fall back to the source-language name.
show.variantHint: The public “spec selector” only appears when this product shares a series with others.
show.luminaireHint: Pick a standard type. AI uses it for more accurate box contents and install.
show.description: Product description (paragraph under the public H1)
show.highlightsEmpty: No highlights yet. Add 3–4, e.g. “Waterproof IP65”, “5-year warranty”.
show.appsEmpty: No scenes yet. Add 3–6, e.g. “Retail”, “Outdoor”, “Industrial”, with photos.
show.heading: Heading
show.blocksEmpty: No detail yet. Alternate heading / paragraph / image to build a long page.
show.boxEmpty: Empty. e.g. Fixture ×1, accessories ×1, manual ×1, warranty card ×1.
show.dimHintSrc: Used for the dimension diagram; empty falls back to the spec table
show.dimHintTr: Values are source-only; only the cutout note is translated here
show.installPh: Install method in one line, e.g. recessed + spring clips
show.faqEmpty: No Q&A yet. End-customer, usage-oriented: how to install, choosing CCT, outdoor use, warranty, what's in the box.
show.aiLayoutHint: Upload a few images plus a short description; AI builds an interleaved long-form detail layout (replaces current blocks, still needs saving).
show.aiLayoutBriefPh: Describe in a paragraph what to show, the order and the focus…
show.aiLayoutNeed: Upload at least one image and write a description first
show.aiLayoutDone: Detail layout generated — review and save
show.aiLayoutConfirm: This will replace the current detail blocks (nothing is stored until you click save). Continue?
show.genDone: AI draft filled in — review, tweak, then save
show.transFromConfirm: Translate from {lang} and overwrite all other languages. Continue?
show.editLangHint: Edit in whichever language tab you're on; “AI translate” refreshes all other languages from the current one.

pdf.title: Auto-fill from PDF
pdf.hint: Upload a product datasheet PDF; AI extracts name / specs / certifications / dimensions / installation and fills the fields. Only what the document states — never invented.
pdf.dropHint: You can also drop the PDF onto this card.
pdf.previewTitle: Extraction result · tick the fields to fill
pdf.previewHint: Fields marked “overwrite” already have content and will be replaced; the page reloads after applying.
pdf.nothing: No usable fields could be extracted from the PDF
pdf.fromPdfHint: Upload a datasheet PDF; AI creates the product and fills the fields

misc.suggestEmpty: No suggestions. The product must be a strip with PCB width / voltage filled, and matching channel / power must exist in this factory.
misc.videoUrl: Video link, or upload on the right
misc.videoNeedFields: Enter a title and a video URL

more.autofillDesc: For products missing showcase content, AI-generate selling points / scenes / FAQ / box / install / detail and translate to all languages. Pending now
more.autofillNote: Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Generated content is a draft; review on the product page before publishing.
more.impStep1Hint: Download the template, fill the four sheets (products / specs / images / accessories) keyed by model, then upload to preview. Import writes to factory
more.name: Name
more.errorsSkip: {n} rows have issues and will be skipped
more.moreRows: … {n} more rows, download the full report
more.noValid: No valid product rows to import
more.impDone: Import done: {created} created, {updated} updated, {linkRows} accessory links
more.facNameHelp: Official factory name, used in the public footer © line
more.facLogoHelp: Click to upload the logo; saved to R2 automatically. Transparent PNG recommended
more.facAccentHelp: Tenant brand color, injected as the product page accent at runtime.
more.facEmailHelp: mailto target for the inquiry button
more.facNoteHelp: Shown on one line above the inquiry button.
more.anaAllGood: ✓ All products have showcase content with complete, up-to-date translations.
more.anaNoScans: No scans in the last 30 days. Export channel-coded QR codes onto products / packaging to start tracking.
more.anaNoFactory: No factory record found. Run db:seed first.
more.emptyProducts: No products yet for this factory. Click “Sync from main site” at the top right, or upload via “Import”.

figures.label: Figures
figures.captionSingle: Photography is illustrative; final finishes vary by spec.
figures.captionMulti: Tap a thumbnail to switch the main view.

box.label: In the Box
box.note: Package contents are indicative; actual packaging prevails.

seriesPage.empty: Products in this series are coming soon.
seriesPage.compareTitle: Compare the models in this series

err.notOwned: Product not found or not owned by the current factory
err.useSourceSave: For the source language use “Save showcase content”
err.needImgBrief: Provide at least one image and a brief
err.selfLink: Cannot link a product to itself
err.modelNotFound: Model “{model}” not found in the current factory
err.modelExists: This model number already exists — edit it or use another
err.selfVariant: Cannot add a product to itself
err.moveIntoSelf: Cannot move a category under itself
err.moveIntoChild: Cannot move a category under one of its children
err.catHasProducts: This category (incl. subcategories) still has {n} products — move them elsewhere first
err.ruleCatsRequired: Select both the main and accessory categories
err.pdfReadFail: Failed to read the PDF — upload it again
err.pdfNoModel: Could not detect a model number in the PDF — create the product manually, then use “Fill from PDF”
err.imageTooLarge: Image too large (4 MB max) — compress or resize it first
err.aiNoKey: OPENROUTER_API_KEY is not configured — AI is unavailable
err.aiBadJson: AI response was not valid JSON
err.attrNotFound: Attribute not found or not owned by the current factory
err.attrKeyInvalid: Invalid key (must start with a letter; letters/digits/underscore only)

notFound.title: Record not found
notFound.desc: No datasheet exists for this code. Verify the reference on the product label, or contact the manufacturer printed on the packaging.
